memes/meme-01.jpg.script_quote: even my own product is vulnerable to this exact shift
memes/meme-01.jpg.description: Dog sitting in burning room saying this is fine, applied to owning a SaaS that's vulnerable

memes/meme-02.jpg.script_quote: Midjourney $10 to $30 a month replace it with Imagen MCP
memes/meme-02.jpg.description: Anime guy asking if butterfly is a pigeon, Midjourney users questioning if Imagen is a downgrade

memes/meme-03.jpg.script_quote: $497 a month every month like clockwork I used 4 features
captions: GHL CHARGING $497/MO FOR HUNDREDS OF FEATURES
ME BUILDING THE 4 I ACTUALLY USE
memes/meme-03.jpg.description: Buff doge = GoHighLevel massive platform, small cheems = just building the 4 features needed

memes/meme-04.jpg.script_quote: Cursor Bolt Replit Agent they all have the same problem They're middlemen
memes/meme-04.jpg.description: Boyfriend (developers) looking at Claude Code direct API instead of wrapper tools girlfriend

memes/meme-05.jpg.script_quote: I used to pay over $1,000 a month in software subscriptions
memes/meme-05.jpg.description: Drake rejecting per-seat pricing, approving one API key with infinite agents

memes/meme-06.jpg.script_quote: Semrush charges up to $450 a month for a dashboard with hundreds of features I never touch
captions: FINDING OUT THE DATA COMES FROM DATAFORSEO
REALIZING YOU CAN HIT THE API DIRECTLY FOR $50
memes/meme-06.jpg.description: Progressive clown makeup as you realize how badly you're overpaying for Semrush

memes/meme-07.jpg.script_quote: Every workflow you're paying Zapier to run is really just paying for a UI
captions: EVERY SAAS SUBSCRIPTION IS JUST PAYING FOR A UI WRAPPER
memes/meme-07.jpg.description: Man at table with sign saying every SaaS subscription is just paying for a UI wrapper

memes/meme-08.jpg.script_quote: cut in half The SEO had to publicly apologize on Twitter
captions: CURSOR CUTS PRO REQUESTS FROM 500 TO 225
memes/meme-08.jpg.description: Surprised Pikachu face when Cursor cuts requests in half

memes/meme-09.jpg.script_quote: When you're a wrapper your economics are controlled by the company you wrap
memes/meme-09.jpg.description: Guy holding 25 UNO cards because wrappers won't lower API costs

memes/meme-10.jpg.script_quote: 6 subscriptions $700 to $1,100 a month and the replacement cost for all 6 combined
captions: REALIZE YOU ONLY USE 10% OF EACH
TOOLS DO MORE THAN THE ORIGINALS
memes/meme-10.jpg.description: Brain expanding as you realize you can replace all 6 SaaS tools with one subscription

memes/meme-11.jpg.script_quote: paying $497 every single month for a platform where 96% of the features
captions: YOU RECEIVE: 4 FEATURES OUT OF HUNDREDS
memes/meme-11.jpg.description: Trade offer guy showing the absurd deal GoHighLevel offers

memes/meme-12.jpg.script_quote: They charge per task and complex workflows get expensive
captions: ME WAITING FOR ZAPIER TO ADD THE ONE AUTOMATION I NEED
memes/meme-12.jpg.description: Skeleton on bench waiting forever for Zapier to stop charging per task

memes/meme-13.jpg.script_quote: They're wrappers Same exact structure as every SaaS on the kill list
captions: LEARN TO BUILD IT YOURSELF FOR $80
memes/meme-13.jpg.description: Sweating man struggling to choose between paying $1,100/mo or building for $80

memes/meme-14.jpg.script_quote: Let me show you exactly what I canceled
captions: THE SAAS I KILLED STARTER PACK
memes/meme-14.jpg.description: Starter pack grid showing 6 SaaS tools with red X marks through each, total replaced by $80

memes/meme-15.jpg.script_quote: That's the entire business model Take something that exists wrap it in a dashboard and charge monthly
memes/meme-15.jpg.description: Flow diagram showing YOU at top, Cursor/Lovable/Bolt as red middleman layer, Claude API at bottom

memes/meme-16.jpg.script_quote: even the AI coding tools themselves they're all getting eaten alive
memes/meme-16.jpg.description: Traditional SaaS being crushed between enterprise AI from above and solo builders from below

memes/meme-17.jpg.script_quote: Travel agents music labels taxi companies Every single time the middleman gets squeezed out
memes/meme-17.jpg.description: Four tombstones in a graveyard for travel agents, music labels, taxi companies, and SaaS wrappers

memes/meme-18.jpg.script_quote: The moment the model provider offers direct access at the same price point the wrapper's entire value proposition collapses
captions: YOU ARE PAYING 10x FOR A UI
memes/meme-18.jpg.description: Fake receipt showing the hidden wrapper tax: $20 API marked up to $200 for a UI

memes/meme-19.jpg.script_quote: SaaS isn't dying it's being redistributed Like music
captions: Independent Artist / Solo Founder with 1 API Key
memes/meme-19.jpg.description: Split comparison: blue side (500 employees, record labels, enterprise SaaS) arrow to green side (independent artist, solo founder with 1 API key)

memes/meme-20.jpg.script_quote: $7,400 to $12,200 per year back in your pocket
memes/meme-20.jpg.description: Before/after money stacks: sad small stack vs happy glowing tall stack with green arrow up
